title: Saddharma-Puṇḍarīka — Samantamukha-parivarta (Kern–Nanjio, IAST)
content:
## §1 The question raised

*From the Saddharma-Puṇḍarīka edited from Nepalese manuscripts by H. Kern and Bunyiu Nanjio,* Bibliotheca Buddhica X (St-Pétersbourg: Académie Impériale, 1908–1912) — public domain. Selections from chapter XXIV, the Samantamukha-parivarta. IAST transcription of the Devanāgarī mūla.

Atha khalv-Akṣayamatir bodhisattvo mahāsattva utthāya-āsanād-ekāṃsam-uttarāsaṅgaṃ kṛtvā dakṣiṇaṃ jānu-maṇḍalaṃ pṛthivyāṃ pratiṣṭhāpya yena Bhagavāṃs tena-añjaliṃ praṇamya Bhagavantam-etad-avocat:

Kena kāraṇena Bhagavan Avalokiteśvaro bodhisattvo mahāsattva Avalokiteśvara ity-ucyate?

## §2 Liberation from peril

Evam ukte Bhagavān Akṣayamatim bodhisattvam mahāsattvam-etad-avocat: Iha kula-putra yāvanti satva-koṭyo duḥkhaiḥ paripīḍyamānāḥ Avalokiteśvarasya bodhisattvasya nāma śroṣyanti, sarve te tasmāt duḥkha-skandhāt parimokṣyante.

Ye ca kula-putra Avalokiteśvarasya bodhisattvasya nāma dhārayiṣyanti, te ced-api mahato 'gni-skandhe prapateyuḥ, sarve te 'gnito mokṣyante tasya bodhisattvasya-anubhāvena.

## §3 The thirty-two forms

Yena yena rūpeṇa kula-putra satvāḥ paripācayitavyāḥ, tena tena rūpeṇa-Avalokiteśvaro bodhisattvo mahāsattva ātmānam upadarśayati. Ye buddha-rūpeṇa vinetavyāḥ, teṣāṃ buddha-rūpeṇa dharmaṃ deśayati. Ye bodhisattva-rūpeṇa, teṣāṃ bodhisattva-rūpeṇa. Ye śrāvaka-rūpeṇa, ye brāhmaṇa-rūpeṇa, ye gṛhapati-rūpeṇa, ye upāsaka-rūpeṇa, ye dārikā-rūpeṇa — sarvābhi rūpeṇa Avalokiteśvaro bodhisattvo dharmaṃ deśayati.

## §4 The verse

Atha khalv-Akṣayamatir bodhisattvo mahāsattvo Bhagavantam-imāṃ gāthām abhāṣata:

*Avalokitasvara karuṇekṣaṇo viśuddha-cakṣur*
*Maitra-prema-kṛpā-svabhāva sukhada-svabhāva,*
*Lokasya tva loka-bandhuḥ pratibhāse,*
*Saumya tasmād bhaja Avalokitasvaram.*

*Brahma-svaro Avalokitasvarasya megha-svaraḥ,*
*Dharma-megha-svaro madhura-svaras-saumyaḥ,*
*Tasmād bhaja-bhaja saumya Avalokitasvaram.*

Asmin khalu Samantamukha-parivarte bhāṣyamāṇe caturaśīter satva-sahasrāṇi anuttarāyāṃ samyaksambodhau cittam-utpādayāmāsuḥ.
locator: Bibliotheca Buddhica X (1908–12), Saddharma-Puṇḍarīka, ch. XXIV
translator: Sanskrit edition: H. Kern & Bunyiu Nanjio (eds.)
